description: Docstring generation tasks â€” given a function body, write a Python docstring

tasks.name: docstring_paginate
tasks.prompt:
Write a Python docstring for this function. Output only the docstring (triple-quoted string), nothing else.

def paginate(items: list, page: int, page_size: int) -> list:
    start = (page - 1) * page_size
    end = start + page_size
    return items[start:end]

tasks.name: docstring_slugify
tasks.prompt:
Write a Python docstring for this function. Output only the docstring (triple-quoted string), nothing else.

import re

def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    text = text.lower().strip()
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\s-]', '', text)
    text = re.sub(r'[\s_-]+', '-', text)
    text = re.sub(r'^-+|-+$', '', text)
    return text
